summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: ms_vocab_richness_mean_scale_var (r=+0.56), moment_impact_score (r=-0.54), thumb_sharpness (r=-0.45). Top predictors of retention_30s: ms_surprise_density_scale_var (r=+0.59). Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: shareability_score (r=-0.67), moment_impact_score (r=-0.60), ms_scale_agreement (r=-0.54). Top predictors of engagement_comment_ratio: moment_impact_score (r=-0.69), shareability_score (r=-0.67), resolution_language_score (r=-0.59). Top predictors of engagement_overall_ratio: shareability_score (r=-0.67), moment_impact_score (r=-0.63), ms_scale_agreement (r=-0.53). Top predictors of outlier_potential: thumb_brightness (r=-0.57), thumb_sharpness (r=-0.57). Top predictors of outlier_spike_score: thumb_brightness (r=-0.69), thumb_sharpness (r=-0.54). Top predictors of outlier_retention_score: moment_impact_score (r=-0.71), shareability_score (r=-0.65), thumb_center_weight (r=-0.49). Top predictors of ret_baseline: moment_impact_score (r=-0.75), shareability_score (r=-0.65), thumb_center_weight (r=-0.52).
